SS2_KNIGHT_DESCRIPTION: Miles est peritus expertus in proelio propinquo, duellans et parrians hostes cum preciso tempore et executione.\n\n<color=#CCD3E0>< ! > parry.
SS2_KNIGHT_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abiit, ad ipsam spei medullam percussus.
SS2_KNIGHT_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..et sic evanuit, scuto fracto et spe extinguita.
SS2_KNIGHT_PASSIVE_DESC: A buff ward circumdat te quod praebet sociis in eius radio <style=cIsDamage>20% attack speed</style> et <style=cIsDamage>20% damage</style>.
SS2_KNIGHT_PRIMARY_SWORD_DESC: Seca ante pro <style=cIsDamage>200% vulnere</style>. Quisque tertius ictus punctur ante pro <style=cIsDamage>400% vulnere</style>. Dum bloccans, percutite hostes pro <style=cIsDamage>400% vulnere</style>.
SS2_KEYWORD_PARRY: <style=cKeywordName>Parry</style><style=cSub>Block an incoming hit to <style=cIsUtility>stun</style> et deal <style=cIsDamage>350% damage</style> to all enemies around you. You quoque fias <style=cIsUtility>immune to damage</style> pro 1 second.</style>
SS2_KNIGHT_SECONDARY_SHIELD_DESC: Leva scutum tuum, adipiscens <style=cIsUtility>400 armaturam</style>. Utere ante invenientem ictum ad <style=cIsDamage>parry</style> eum et <color=#fa78f3>Empower</color> tuam proximam peritiam.
SS2_KNIGHT_SECONDARY_SHIELD_DESC2: Leva scutum tuum, adipiscens <style=cIsUtility>400 armaturam</style> et reponens tuum saltum cum <style=cIsUtility>roll</style>. Utere ante invenientem ictum ad <style=cIsDamage>parry</style> eum et <color=#fa78f3>Empower</color> tuam proximam peritiam.
SS2_KNIGHT_SHIELD_BASH_DESC: Scutum Percute ante te pro <style=cIsDamage>240% vulnere</style> et <style=cIsUtility>stupefac</style> hostes percussos.
SS2_KNIGHT_UTILITY_LEAP_DESC: Cursor ante, volvens et secans repeatedly pro <style=cIsDamage>120% vulnere</style> per ictum. Numerus ictuum scalatur cum attack speed.
SS2_KNIGHT_SPECIAL_BANNER_DESC: Figat vexillum in terram pro <style=cIsDamage>750% vulnere</style>. Socii proximi <style=cIsDamage>smite</style> hostes cum suis impugnationibus, minuendo eorum armaturam et <style=cIsHealing>restaurando valetudinem</style>.
